typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_viha_input_file_name as string (),
	var_viha_input_folder as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT vo.order_row_id AS specimen_row_id 		, vo.order_row_id AS order_row_id 		, svtr.order_id  		, svtr.encounter_id  		, svtr.package_cd  		, svtr.careset_order_id  		, svtr.collection_dt_tm  		, CONVERT (VARCHAR, svtr.collection_dt_tm, 23 ) AS collection_date 		, CONVERT (VARCHAR, svtr.collection_dt_tm, 8) AS collection_time 		, svtr.receive_dt_tm  		, CONVERT (VARCHAR, svtr.receive_dt_tm, 23 ) AS receive_date 		, CONVERT (VARCHAR, svtr.receive_dt_tm, 8) AS receive_time 		, NULL AS receive_tech_code 		, svtr.accession_number 		, svtr.accession_id 		, svtr.container_id 		, NULL AS specimen_code 		, NULL AS specimen_type 		, svtr.dss_lis_instance_id  FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result svtr   INNER JOIN lab.viha_order vo ON svtr.order_id = vo.order_id AND svtr.dss_lis_instance_id = vo.dss_lis_instance_id',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		collection_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		collection_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		accession_id as integer,
		package_cd as integer,
		receive_time as string,
		specimen_row_id as string,
		dss_lis_instance_id as long,
		receive_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		receive_tech_code as string,
		accession_number as string,
		order_row_id as string,
		receive_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		specimen_type as string,
		collection_time as string,
		encounter_id as integer,
		careset_order_id as integer,
		order_id as integer,
		container_id as integer,
		specimen_code as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		collection_dt_tm,
		collection_date,
		accession_id,
		package_cd,
		receive_time,
		specimen_row_id,
		dss_lis_instance_id,
		receive_date,
		receive_tech_code,
		accession_number,
		order_row_id,
		receive_dt_tm,
		specimen_type,
		collection_time,
		encounter_id,
		careset_order_id,
		order_id,
		container_id,
		specimen_code)) ~> OLEDBDestination
